item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Inter-City Bus System Funding
item.description:
👀 Federal Inter-City Bus System Funding

What

Federal inter-city bus system funding in the 119th Congress addressing rural mobility gaps in jurisdictions without passenger rail.

What it does

  • Essential Air Service-analog for bus service · FTA Section 5311(f) intercity-bus expansion · rural-route subsidies · Tribal mobility provisions.

Composes

Save-the-World Paper 3 (Cooperative Shelter — mobility composing) · BEAD + rural infrastructure.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
